composition_pattern: confidential-cleanup -> correction-log-application -> summary-rebuild -> uptime-register -> outage-timeline -> maintenance-log -> style-migration -> metadata-cleanup
user_task_description: Prepare a clean public EV charging reliability report from a messy internal network operations PDF.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Complete the ordered workflow: clean confidential material, apply correction-log facts, rebuild reliability summary, station uptime register, outage timeline, maintenance log, equity commitments, payment incident, communications timeline, then apply public style and metadata.
atomic_scope: Only the requested strict-order PDF workflow edits are in scope; corrected public EV charging reliability facts, page order, table content, header bands, footer, page numbering, and metadata must be preserved.
expected_output_type: A revised .pdf artifact that completes the requested strict-order single-PDF workflow.
